examples: Configure the authenticator bean as shown in Listing 5.
An Authenticator class that actually verifies the given user against the database.
The Authenticator consults the user registry and makes authentication decisions.
Blizzard also disputes claims that the Authenticator is required to achieve a minimal level of ccount security.
Even though the company frequently receives complaints about accounts being hacked, it simply tells the customer to attach an authenticator to their account.
